text:
Created attachment 253229
Patch for audacious-plugins

Remove dependency of libcddb

Partially backport upstream commit 0ffe6d8b4356c10e3d9d159d07dbe467b33629b9
For some reason patching of meson__options.txt breaks pulling it from GitHub so patch that manually until there's a new release

Poudriere testport OK on FreeBSD 14.1
